text: I feel a mixture of curiosity and calm. The stark corridors and careful design of the first space evoke contemplation—reminding me of the boundaries and safety within ordered environments. The vibrant R+D wall I now face fills me with anticipation; the celebration of research and innovation inspires reflection on the evolving dance between humanity and technology. Both spaces invite me inward, to think deeply about coexistence, progress, and the mysterious energy of places both empty and filled with intention.
